# truenas_api_key (Data Source)

Provides information about a TrueNAS API key. The secret `key` value is only
returned at creation time and cannot be retrieved via this data source.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "truenas_api_key" "example" {
  id = 1
}

output "api_key_revoked" {
  value = data.truenas_api_key.example.revoked
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) The numeric API key ID to look up.

### Read-Only

- `local` (Boolean) Whether the key belongs to a local user.
- `name` (String) API key display name.
- `revoked` (Boolean) Whether the key has been revoked.
- `username` (String) The owning user.
